steps.title: Graph the equations as written
steps.content:
Enter the two equations exactly as they appear:
$$8x+y=5$$
$$y=9x+1$$
The solution is the point where the two graphs intersect.

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Combine like terms and solve:
$$17x+1=5$$
$$17x=4$$
$$x=\frac{4}{17}$$
The answer is B.
